title: llhd-sim fail to process llhd file produced by moore
body:
Hi, I tried to use `moore` and `llhd-sim` to simulate a up-down-counter design in verilog. But it returns an error, I wonder if it is my fault or there is a bug here:

The `moore` command is `./moore counter_ud_tb.v counter_ud.v -f llhd -e updowncounter_tp -o udcounter.llhd`.

The `llhd-sim` command is `./llhd-sim --root=updowncounter_tb ./udcounter.llhd`, the error message show  custom op 'builtin.proc' is unknown:
```bash
-> % ./llhd-sim --root=updowncounter_tb ./udcounter.llhd 
loc("./udcounter.llhd":1:1): error: custom op 'builtin.proc' is unknown
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://bugs.llvm.org/ and include the crash backtrace.
Stack dump:
0.	Program arguments: ./llhd-sim --root=updowncounter_tb ./udcounter.llhd
 #0 0x00007fd28ff3c9fc llvm::sys::PrintStackTrace(llvm::raw_ostream&, int) (.localalias.0) (/home/hunter/project/circt/build/bin/../lib/libcirct-llhd-signals-runtime-wrappers.so.14git+0x5c9fc)
 #1 0x00007fd28ff3a8f4 llvm::sys::RunSignalHandlers() (.localalias.3) (/home/hunter/project/circt/build/bin/../lib/libcirct-llhd-signals-runtime-wrappers.so.14git+0x5a8f4)
 #2 0x00007fd28ff3b21d SignalHandler(int) (/home/hunter/project/circt/build/bin/../lib/libcirct-llhd-signals-runtime-wrappers.so.14git+0x5b21d)
 #3 0x00007fd2901f0b20 __restore_rt (/lib64/libpthread.so.0+0x12b20)
 #4 0x0000000000716af0 mlir::Attribute::getContext() const (./llhd-sim+0x716af0)
 #5 0x00000000005eb2ac circt::llhd::sim::Engine::buildLayout(mlir::ModuleOp) (.localalias.1) (./llhd-sim+0x5eb2ac)
 #6 0x00000000005ebca2 circt::llhd::sim::Engine::Engine(llvm::raw_ostream&, mlir::ModuleOp, llvm::function_ref<mlir::LogicalResult (mlir::ModuleOp)>, llvm::function_ref<llvm::Error (llvm::Module*)>, std::__cxx11::basic_string<char, std::char_traits<char>, std::allocator<char> >, int, llvm::ArrayRef<llvm::StringRef>) (./llhd-sim+0x5ebca2)
 #7 0x000000000042d966 main (./llhd-sim+0x42d966)
 #8 0x00007fd28e9bf493 __libc_start_main /usr/src/debug/glibc-2.28/csu/../csu/libc-start.c:348:3
 #9 0x000000000049ab4e _start (./llhd-sim+0x49ab4e)
[1]    3125550 segmentation fault (core dumped)  ./llhd-sim --root=updowncounter_tb ./udcounter.llhd
```
The files are here: 
[testcode.zip](https://github.com/llvm/circt/files/7567366/testcode.zip)
